title: Deprecate Stripe v1 & Migrate to Adyen Gateway
content:
Description:
Stripe v1 SDK is deprecated by the vendor and has been flagged for deprecation. We are replacing it with Adyen to support robust multi-currency transactions and satisfy PCI compliance requirements.

Decision log:
- Decided to implement Adyen gateway wrapper.
- Deprecate old StripeClient wrapper and throw warnings.
- Target complete removal by Q1 2024.

Comments:
Charlie: Initial draft PR is ready. The gateway selection is flag-controlled.
